mapping.b_element: model of ribosome traffic with steric exclusion on mRNA track

mapping.a_element: local inhomogeneities (slow sites with hopping rate q < 1)
mapping.b_element: alternating sequence of translocation and pause in ribosome movement

brief_justification: Both papers model driven transport processes with exclusion interactions: TASEP for extended particles and ribosome traffic on mRNA. The slow sites in TASEP correspond to pauses in ribosome translocation, and the stationary current maps to ribosome velocity. Both use exclusion principles and analyze steady-state behavior, sharing the same underlying stochastic particle-hopping machinery with spatial constraints.
